rubric: Flavor notes and proof must match brand or distillery official pages. Source URL in Article Source (AC); Source Confidence (W) = Manufacturer official.

SPI-CUR-PAPPY-23.notes: caramel, ripe apple, cherry, oak, tobacco, chocolate
SPI-CUR-PAPPY-23.research: Buffalo Trace / Old Rip Van Winkle official: wheated bourbon 23 years; 95.6 proof. Finish long sweet caramel with pronounced wood.

SPI-CUR-BLANTONS.notes: maple, honey, vanilla, orange citrus, stewed berries, caramel, toffee, baking spice
SPI-CUR-BLANTONS.research: Blanton's official: single barrel Kentucky straight bourbon, 93 proof, BT mash bill #1 (not wheated). Horse-stopper presentation; cult request pour.

SPI-TRK-BT-BUFFALO.notes: vanilla, mint, molasses, brown sugar, spice, oak, toffee, dark fruit, anise
SPI-TRK-BT-BUFFALO.research: Buffalo Trace Distillery official flagship; 90 proof, mash bill #1.

SPI-TRK-WOODFORD.notes: dried fruit, mint, orange, cocoa, vanilla, tobacco spice, citrus, cinnamon, toffee, caramel, chocolate
SPI-TRK-WOODFORD.research: Woodford Reserve official: 90.4 proof pot-still bourbon; 200+ flavor notes per distillery.

SPI-TRK-OF-1920.notes: cherry preserves, caramel, dark chocolate, maple syrup, spiced nuts, malt, nougat, rye spice, cedar, toasted coconut, charred marshmallow, oak spice
SPI-TRK-OF-1920.research: Old Forester official Whiskey Row; 115 proof homage to Prohibition-era barrel proof.

SPI-TRK-EAGLE-RARE.notes: toffee, orange peel, herbs, honey, leather, oak, candied almonds, cocoa
SPI-TRK-EAGLE-RARE.research: Buffalo Trace Distillery official Eagle Rare 10 Year; 90 proof, mash bill #1.

SPI-TRK-WP-10.notes: allspice, orange peel, anise, oak, char, caramel, vanilla, rye spice, mint, butterscotch
SPI-TRK-WP-10.mash: High-rye whiskey (Canadian distillate; bottled in Vermont)
SPI-TRK-WP-10.research: WhistlePig official 10 Year Small Batch Rye; 100 proof. Nose/palate/finish per whistlepigwhiskey.com.

SPI-TRK-SAZERAC-RYE.notes: clove, vanilla, anise, pepper, candied spice, citrus, licorice
SPI-TRK-SAZERAC-RYE.research: Sazerac Company official: 90 proof Kentucky straight rye; classic Sazerac cocktail base.

SPI-TRK-GLENFID-12.notes: pear, butterscotch, cream, malt, subtle oak, fresh fruit
SPI-TRK-GLENFID-12.research: Glenfiddich official 12 Year Old; 40% ABV Speyside single malt.

SPI-TRK-DIPLO-RE.notes: orange peel, toffee, licorice, fudge, dark chocolate, dried fruit, molasses
SPI-TRK-DIPLO-RE.research: Diplomático official Reserva Exclusiva; 40% ABV Venezuelan rum blend.

SPI-TRK-ZACAPA-23.notes: caramel, vanilla, cacao, butterscotch, toasted hazelnut, toffee, dried pineapple, apricot, nutmeg, leather, tobacco, coffee, cinnamon, ginger
SPI-TRK-ZACAPA-23.research: Ron Zacapa official No. 23 Centenario; Sistema Solera 6–23 years; 40% ABV.
